title: 8 Essential Herbal Oils for Periodontal Disease and Oral Wellness
description: Thymus vulgaris essential oil, also known as thyme oil, is a natural remedy that can help combat periodontal disease. This is because thyme oil has antimicrobial properties, which help to kill bacteria that cause gum inflammation and infection. When gums are infected, it can lead to periodontal disease, which causes the gums to pull away from the teeth and form deep pockets. Thyme oil's antimicrobial properties can help reduce the presence of these bacteria, allowing the gums to heal a...
